description_long: This is a modern electric radiator with a sleek, rectangular frame and a series of evenly spaced, horizontal bars forming the main heating surface. The bars are slightly curved outward, giving the radiator a contemporary, ergonomic appearance. It is finished in a dark, matte color and features a visible power cord connected to a wall socket, indicating its electric operation. The radiator is designed to be mounted vertically on a wall, with mounting brackets visible on the back. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, likely steel or aluminum, with plastic components for the power connection. The design is minimalist, with no visible manual or thermostatic valves, and the horizontal bar arrangement maximizes heat dissipation and towel hanging functionality.
description: A modern, wall-mounted electric radiator with curved horizontal bars and a matte dark finish, featuring a visible power cord and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of curved horizontal bars and the attached power cord on the lower right.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the radiator's slim depth and the protruding mounting brackets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mounting brackets and the power cord connection on the lower left.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim depth and mounting brackets.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; electric power cord connection on lower side
